TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: mowas pori bisya' ci ro nyu si mowas pori laga, yani nya p'iyu maha ya kingan mwalah la. trang mung ta hngiyang pori kwe, ana m'ima cyoli Tayal ga nanu yaca t'aring musa smreyu lukus ro tmapang mhbing Sali, yaca ini kyupiy 'walah.
S.PHON: mowas~…ē pori ő≤is~…ēja Ē ¶~ ®i ro nju s~…ēi mowas~…ē pori la…£a, jani nja p Ēiju mańßa ja kiŇčan mwalańß la. traŇč muŇč ta ńßŇčijaŇč pori kwe, ana m Ēima ¶~ ®joli tajal …£a nanu ja ¶~ ®a t ĒariŇč mus~…ēa s~…ēmreju lukus~…ē ro tmapaŇč mńßő≤iŇč s~…ēali, ja ¶~ ®a ini kjupij Ēwalańß.
S.FORM: mowas pori bisya' ci ro nyu si mowas pori laga, yani nya p'iyu maha ya kingan mwalah la. trang mung ta hngiyang pori kwe, ana m'ima cyoli Tayal ga nanu yaca t'aring musa smreyu lukus ro tmapang mhbing Sali, yaca ini kyupiy 'walah.
S.PHON: mowas~…ē pori ő≤is~…ēja Ē ¶~ ®i ro nju s~…ēi mowas~…ē pori la…£a, jani nja p Ēiju mańßa ja kiŇčan mwalańß la. traŇč muŇč ta ńßŇčijaŇč pori kwe, ana m Ēima ¶~ ®joli tajal …£a nanu ja ¶~ ®a t ĒariŇč mus~…ēa s~…ēmreju lukus~…ē ro tmapaŇč mńßő≤iŇč s~…ēali, ja ¶~ ®a ini kjupij Ēwalańß.
